description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image and define variables ARTIFACTS_DIR=artifacts and REPO_NAME=gitlab.com/diamondburned/go-nhentai. Add a before_script that creates ${GOPATH}/src/${REPO_NAME} and ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/${ARTIFACTS_DIR}, copies the project files into the GOPATH source directory, changes to that directory, and runs go get -u github.com/gdamore/tcell and go get -u github.com/anaskhan96/soup. Define a single stage build with a compile job that runs go build -o ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/go-nhentai, go clean, GOARCH="arm64" go build -o ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/go-nhentai-arm64, go clean, GOOS="windows" go build -o ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/go-nhentai.exe, and then stores the ${ARTIFACTS_DIR} directory as an artifact.
